item.title: Images of Note: miiau

Love how I don't need to translate this :)
Point is, don't use xitter.
the cat's coat is from the Dog Face ;_;
basically
RUN
Hell yeah!
Fashion Pomni!
I'd watch this
zero thoughts
f l a t

item.dc:creator: SytchArt

item.title: Need a reminder of your fleeting existence today?
item.description:
I’m warning you, this dump hurt my feelings
Deeply acknowledging the finality of eras passed has been something I have really felt lately
And this dump really hones that
So I’m warning you
The fleeting nature of existence is what makes it feel so special, so beautiful, yet the constant dull ache of yearning for what has passed and will never be again really puts a continual knot in one’s stomach
item.dc:creator: Montanaebananae

item.title: Only 6,679 more bottom shelf memes to go
item.description:
❤️
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the meme competitions
Now only 6,679 more memes!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax You can catch her live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
